name: @cairn/core
description: The Cairn serial router, one-call Codex Exec adapter, offline adapter, records, and Git protections

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && npm run sync-contract && tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/contract-mirrors.test.mjs dist/test/files.test.js dist/test/steps.test.js dist/test/routing.test.js dist/test/codex.test.js dist/test/serial.test.js
